scope.summary: Operator work-surface: an interactive native chat/launch pane where the operator selects a local or cloud model lane and a folder/worktree, launches a session through the Dexterity SwarmCoordinator contract, and sees the CLI-wrapper conversation, model-exposed reasoning/thought, and tool calls captured as typed ModelLaneMessage records wired to Flight Recorder.
scope.origin: Operator request 2026-07-01: a chatbox/window to choose models (local+cloud) and a folder/repo/worktree to launch in, as a CLI wrapper that mechanically records the conversation, CLI-exposed thought, and tool calls, wired to Flight Recorder. Verified absent from WP-1 MT-001..MT-011 and from the native frontend. The CLI-capture engine (AgentActivity / cli_bridge_runtime / events_agent_activity FR-EVT-AGENT-*) already exists but was built by WP-KERNEL-004/MT-127, lives in the legacy app/src-tauri transcript seam, and is not wired to WP-1 ModelLane authority.
forbidden_paths: app/src-tauri launch or transcript authority for this WP
direct model endpoint calls outside LlmClient/ModelRuntime/CloudLane
acceptance_criteria: A native egui operator pane (registered PaneType in pane_registry.rs, reachable from the RUN menu and/or module switcher) presents an interactive chat/session surface: prompt input, streamed response, and per-turn model-exposed reasoning/thought and tool-call rows.

The pane lets the operator select a model lane kind and concrete model for LOCAL and CLOUD via the spec model-selection mechanism / Work Profiles (spec 4.3.9.4.4; the operator-visible selection UI is built here), and select a folder/worktree/project as the session working location by reusing existing workspace surfaces (project_tree/project_tabs), not a bespoke picker.

Launch resolves through the backend SwarmCoordinator::spawn_session Dexterity launch contract (never a frontend, app/src, direct-endpoint, or terminal launch authority) and produces ModelLaneRun/ModelLane records; missing ModelLaneStore/PostgreSQL authority fails closed.

The CLI-wrapper capture (conversation text, model-exposed reasoning/thought, tool calls) is recorded as typed ModelLaneMessage records under the launched ModelLaneRun, re-homing the WP-KERNEL-004 AgentActivity capture onto the native path (not the legacy app/src-tauri transcript seam), with payload_ref/payload_sha256 to ArtifactStore for non-status bytes.

Every captured conversation/thought/tool-call and launch/status transition emits Flight Recorder/EventLedger evidence and records the HBR-INT-009 three-tier posture (Flight Recorder WIRED where the behavior is a business event; internal_diagnostics and Palmistry DEFERRED-with-reason until WP-KERNEL-012/016 ship).

Argus proof drives the pane headlessly (stable author_id targets for the chat input, model picker, worktree picker, launch control, and transcript rows) and inspects rendered state; negative proof fails on unseen controls or a launch-authority bypass.
Same-change in-product UserManual coverage for the operator chat/launch surface (purpose, model+worktree selection, launch, capture, recovery, Flight Recorder linkage).
Pre- and post-implementation adversarial review through multiple lenses before READY_FOR_VALIDATION; implementer does not self-certify COMPLETED.
proof_targets: TO_BE_FINALIZED_AT_ACTIVATION: exact Rust test targets for (a) backend launch-from-operator-surface through SwarmCoordinator Dexterity contract, (b) CLI-capture persisted as ModelLaneMessage with Flight Recorder evidence, in src/backend/handshake_core (--features test-utils where the suite is gated), and (c) Argus native pane drive in src/frontend/handshake_native. Proof commands MUST name exact test targets and fail on zero matching tests.
scope.risk_if_missed: Operator cannot drive local/cloud model sessions from inside Handshake with a folder/worktree choice; the CLI-wrapper conversation, thought, and tool calls stay siloed in the legacy app/src-tauri path and never become typed ModelLane authority. The operator work-surface that the WP's lane telemetry exists to serve is missing.

implementation_notes: DEPENDS on MT-003 (CLI lane normalized into ModelLane records + embedded ModelRuntime default) and MT-008 (native diagnostics pane + pane_registry pattern + TraceProjection); consumes MT-010 backend navigation/lookup routes for run/lane/message/transcript display.

Model selection is spec-normative (4.3.9.4.4) with UI out-of-scope for module 04; this MT builds the operator-visible selection UI on top of that mechanism and Work Profiles, not a new selection authority.
Folder/worktree selection reuses existing project_tree.rs / project_tabs.rs workspace surfaces rather than a new bespoke picker.

Re-home the WP-KERNEL-004 CLI capture (model_runtime/cloud/agent_activity.rs AgentActivity::{ToolCall,Thinking,Text}; cli_bridge_runtime.rs; flight_recorder/events_agent_activity.rs FR-EVT-AGENT-*) onto the native path and bind it to ModelLaneMessage; do not make the app/src-tauri transcript the authority.
Rust-only: Rust backend plus native egui/Argus. No new TypeScript/React/app-src.

Captured per operator anti-forget directive 2026-07-01. Confirm/adjust boundaries before activation (especially how much Work-Profile model-selection UI and worktree-launch orchestration belongs here vs a sibling WP). Keep additive to the existing RUN menu item and Settings Swarm section.

risks: Operator chat surface could bypass the Dexterity launch authority and call a provider/endpoint directly.
CLI capture could remain in the legacy app/src-tauri transcript seam instead of ModelLaneMessage authority.
Model/worktree selection could reimplement rather than reuse Work Profiles / project_tree workspace surfaces.
minimum_controls: Launch only via SwarmCoordinator::spawn_session Dexterity contract; negative test proves bypass fails closed.
Capture persists as typed ModelLaneMessage under a ModelLaneRun with Flight Recorder/EventLedger evidence.
Reuse existing selection and workspace surfaces.

research_basis.authority_posture: Master spec / SPEC_CURRENT / product code are authority; reset brief 6.6 is operator vision only.
local_authority_checked: .GOV/spec/master-spec-v02.197/spec-modules/04-llm-infrastructure.md (4.3.9.2.5 ModelLane launch, 4.3.9.4.4 model selector UI out-of-scope)

handshake_compatibility.rust_only_implementation: Rust backend plus native egui/Argus only. TypeScript/React/app-src/app-src-tauri/npm are not implementation or proof authority for this WP.
handshake_compatibility.spec_realism_gate: Implementer may move only to READY_FOR_VALIDATION after exact Rust proof targets touch real resources; COMPLETED is validator-only.
